description: You are a Data Engineer tasked with normalizing the Chinook database (/home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook_normalize.db). The 'Composer' column in the 'tracks' table contains comma-separated values which violates 1NF. Normalize this into a relational schema by creating a 'composers' table (ComposerId PK AutoIncrement, Name Text Unique) and a 'track_composers' bridge table (TrackId, ComposerId) with composite PK and Foreign Keys. Populate these tables by parsing the 'tracks.Composer' data, splitting on commas, trimming whitespace, and ignoring NULL values. Create a view named 'v_track_composers' that joins tracks, track_composers, and composers to display TrackId, TrackName, and ComposerName. Export the Top 20 composers by track count to /home/ga/Documents/exports/top_composers.csv with columns ComposerName and TrackCount. Save the complete SQL script to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/normalize_composers.sql. Use 'ChinookNormalize' as the connection name.
